user.title: ZHA Firmware OTA Manager
user.description: Add community firmware sources to ZHA so that devices not covered by the default OTA providers can be updated.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Already configured. Only a single configuration is possible.
abort.zha_not_configured: The ZHA integration is not set up. Configure ZHA first, then add this integration.

init.title: OTA sources
init.description: Choose which firmware sources to add to ZHA. A firmware update can, in rare cases, break a feature or brick a device.

data.extra_urls: Additional remote index URLs (one per line)
data.broadcast: Ask devices to re-check for firmware after changes

check_updates.name: Check for firmware updates
check_updates.description: Re-registers the community OTA sources with ZHA and asks Zigbee devices to re-check for available firmware.
